step.name: acquire-plan
step.action: Run `terraform plan -out plan.out && terraform show -json plan.out > plan.json`.

step.name: scan-redflags
step.action: Apply the red-flag rules against `resource_changes[]`; capture rule_id, severity, resource_address, remediation per match.

step.name: compute-verdict
step.action: Any `high` → fail. Skip condition met → skipped. Otherwise pass.

step.name: emit-report
step.action: Post to PR + CI artifact; gate merge on verdict.
